name: Golden Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all the ingredients in the bread machine pan in the order listed.
Select white bread and press "Start".
2. Unless otherwise noted, all ingredients should be at room temperature.
3. If mixing by hand, knead the dough on a floured surface after each cycle.
4. After second kneading, remove the dough from the machine.
5. Divide the dough into two equal portions and place in small loaf pans.
6. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
7. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
